description: If you want to possess a trendy and stylish look, just have a glance over the range of classy footloose backpacks. Innovative design, graceful colours and high grade fabrics are some relevant qualities of these bags. They are known for their extreme quality features which include flawless finishing, low price rates, enough space, light weight, trendy style and supreme quality fabric. Height: 48 cm Width: 29 cm Depth: 18 cm Warranty: 1 year Made of 600 d PU fabric for enhanced durability One roomy zippered compartment has a separate chamber for your laptop with a velcro fastener Criss-cross string on the front with spring clasp to customise inside space One zippered pouch on the front to stow away essentials One insert pouch for enhanced space Brand badge appliqué d on the front Short padded handle on top for carrying ease Padded, adjustable shoulder straps with brand name and mesh under the straps that ensure ventilation, distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuries Cushioned mesh panels on the back for added comfort Ergonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortably Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
